notableEvents.label: Francisco Alvarez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez grounds into a double play, second baseman Santiago Espinal to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jorge Polanco out at 2nd. Francisco Alvarez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Francisco Lindor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Lindor grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Santiago Espinal to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Marcus Semien out at 2nd. Francisco Lindor out at 1st.
